violations.text: Molluscan Shellfish (little nex and mussels) located in Hooked Prep Unit did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Identification tags provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on Vieste cookline prep unit #1. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The hand-washing sink in the Vieste kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Molluscan Shellfish (Little Necks and Mussels) located in the hooked prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Tags were provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 200 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to call for service to adjust sanitizer concentration to proper level. Establishment to either send dishes and utensils to 3-bay sink or the other dishwasher within the establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Cooked lobster meat and raw salmon in reduced oxygen packaging, salt cured pork belly, and canned seafood and tomatoes were observed in the food establishment. Establishment does not have approval for aforementioned specialized processes. Establishment is to cease specialized processes until proper approval is received. Food items were evaluated and voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Tuna steaks were observed thawing with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood food items that are packaged in ROP shall be removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food items. Food items were evaluated and were removed from their original packaging. Proper thawing methods reviewed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed throughout the kitchen space. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is currently on a biweekly service schedule. Establishment is to work with pest control to create a plan of action to obtain control of pest activity. Establishment is to clean and sanitize all non-food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
A bowl was observed being used as a scoop for a pan of pork in gravy. Bowl was removed from food item during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The prep unit cutting boards in the Vieste cookline are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on Vieste cookline prep unit #1. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025

The Vieste dishwasher in the cookline area was observed to be leaking from the water supply line and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
